subcodes.title: This Great and Glorious Cause: Words spoken on 1911-11-28 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In these gatherings where we have met and spoken together you have all become acquainted with the principles of this dispensation, and with the reality of facts. Unto you it has been given to know these things
subcodes.first_line_orig: موسیو در یفوس امروز صدایش گرفته نمیتواند
subcodes.subjects: @study; deepening, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @power of the Manifestation of God, @The Holy Spirit
